message:
fix(server): harden idempotency store and WebSocket origin validation

IdempotencyStore improvements (server.go):
- Add sync.Once to Stop() method to make it safe for multiple calls
- Prevents panic from closing an already-closed channel
- Important for graceful shutdown scenarios where Stop() may be called
  multiple times from different goroutines or shutdown hooks

WebSocket origin validation hardening (server.go):
- Reject malformed origin headers with missing scheme or host
- Prevents bypass attempts using strings like "//example.com" or "https://"
- Also skip malformed entries in the allowed origins configuration
- Adds explicit logging for rejected malformed origins

agentmail/tools.go:
- Minor cleanup of unused code

These changes improve server robustness and security for production
deployments where edge cases in HTTP headers must be handled safely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
